headline: Tapestry (TPR) Launches AndCoach To Bring Coach Closer To Gen Z
summary: Coach, part of Tapestry (NYSE:TPR), has launched &Coach, a Gen Z co-created content platform focused on always-on storytelling and brand engagement. The platform centers on participatory content developed with young creatives and cultural voices, positioning Coach products within everyday self-expression rather than traditional status marketing. This marks a fresh brand move for Tapestry that aims to deepen relevance with younger consumers through ongoing collaboration and feedback...
